It takes a village
to _

Village matches you with people who share your financial goals. Together, you pool resources, vote on decisions, and achieve what none of you could alone.

Your Rules
Every Voice Counts
$24K+ Pooled
5–50 Members

The Problem

Financial institutions weren't built for you.

Credit is extractive

Traditional credit systems profit from your debt. Interest compounds, fees stack, and the house always wins.

Peer lending is risky

Unregulated person-to-person loans rely on trust alone, leaving no room for accountability, transparency, or recourse.

Banks feel impersonal

You're a number in a system designed to maximize shareholder returns, not to help you reach your goals.

Our Promise

We're building finance the way it should work.

Privacy by design — We are contractually prohibited from owning your data. Your personal financial information is never sold, shared with advertisers, or used to build a credit file against you.
You profit first — We make our money by taking a 2% cut of money paid out to your village. No hidden fees, and no predatory interest. We only succed when you succeed.
Your community, your rules — Every financial decision and village rule is made by a majority vote of your village members. No corporate override, ever.
Radical transparency — Every contribution, withdrawal, and vote is visible to your village in real time. No black boxes.
Built for real people — We match you with neighbors and peers who share your actual financial goals, not a generic risk profile.
Safety in numbers — Pooled resources and shared accountability spread risk across the group, so no single person bears it alone.

How It Works

Join your village in three steps.

01

Create your profile

Share your financial goals, income sources, and priorities. Your data stays private.

02

Form your village

Set up governance rules, contribution schedules, and a constitution together, or join an existing village.

03

Grow together

Pool funds, vote on how to use them, and watch your shared goals come to life.

Two Ways to Get Started

Start with who you know, or let us find your people.

Village works however your community works — whether you're building from scratch or formalizing something that already exists.

Bring your own village

Already have a crew? Invite them directly. Village gives structure and accountability to relationships that already exist.

  • Friends & family savings circles
  • Coworkers building toward shared goals
  • Community organizations & nonprofits
  • Church groups, alumni networks, clubs
  • Business partners & collectives

Get algorithmically matched

Don't have a group yet? We analyze your financial profile and connect you with compatible people who share your goals.

  • Matched on goals, income, and timeline
  • Filtered by location or zip code
  • 200+ compatibility data points
  • Opt into anonymous matching first
  • Meet before committing to a village

Key Features

Everything your village needs.

Tailored for you

Matching Algorithm

Financial profiles analyzed across 200+ data points — income, debt, assets, goals, location — to find your ideal community.

1 person = 1 vote

Democratic Governance

Every member gets a vote on fund allocation, payout ratios, timing, and village rules. No one person controls the money.

Open ledger

Full Transparency

See every transaction, every decision, every contribution in a shared ledger. Nothing is hidden from village members.

Pre-funded

Reverse Credit

Not credit you pay back — credit already paid in advance. The pooled fund is the collateral, and liquidity is issued from what you've collectively contributed.

In-app chat

Built-in Communication

Per-village chat, decision threads, and announcement channels keep everyone coordinated without leaving the platform.

Bank-grade

Escrow Security

Village holds funds in escrow — safe, audited, and distributed only when the village votes. Your money is protected.

Stories from the village.

I never thought I'd find people who understood both my debt anxiety and my savings goals. My village helped me pay off $12K in credit card debt in 8 months.

Pooling investment capital with five other young professionals gave us access to opportunities none of us could've touched alone.

The democratic voting is what sold me. Everyone has equal say in how our pooled funds get used. It's real financial cooperation.

Debt-Free Together

Frequently asked questions.

All village funds are held in FDIC-insured escrow accounts. Funds are only distributed when the village votes to do so — no single person can withdraw unilaterally. We partner with regulated financial institutions and maintain full audit trails.

We analyze over 200 financial data points including income sources, debt types, asset profiles, financial goals, and geographic location. Using advanced statistical matching, we find people whose financial profiles and goals align closely with yours.

Village takes a 2% fee on all funds deposited into village pools. This fee decreases to 1% as your village's pool size grows, rewarding larger and more active communities.

Yes. You can leave any village at any time. Your contributed share is returned according to the village's constitution and withdrawal terms, which are established democratically when the village forms.

Every village member gets one vote. Decisions on fund allocation, payout schedules, and constitutional changes require a majority vote. All votes are recorded transparently in the village ledger.

Traditional credit gives you money now and makes you pay it back later with interest. Village's reverse credit model means members pre-fund a joint pool first. The pooled fund is the collateral — you're accessing liquidity from what's already been collectively contributed.

Ready to build your village?

Join thousands building cooperative financial futures. Your community is your greatest asset.

VILLAGE

A platform for cooperative finance. It takes a village to thrive together.
